explanation.zh: AKo 在任何位置都是标准开局加注：它压制所有未入池范围，加注能建立底池并拿下翻前主动权。
explanation.en: AKo is a standard open from every seat: it dominates unopened ranges, and raising builds the pot while taking preflop initiative.

fold.zh: 弃掉最强的非对子起手牌是严重失误（blunder）——它在 UTG 范围里也排在最前列。
fold.en: Folding the strongest unpaired starting hand is a blunder — it sits at the very top of the UTG range.

call.zh: 无人入池时跟注（limp）放弃主动权，还邀请多人底池稀释 AKo 的胜率。本训练默认 raise-or-fold。
call.en: Open-limping gives up initiative and invites a multiway pot that dilutes AKo's equity. This trainer assumes raise-or-fold.

objective.zh: 建立"强牌主动加注"的翻前基线。
objective.en: Set the baseline: strong hands open-raise.

explanation.zh: KJo 看着体面，但 UTG 后面还有五个玩家：它经常被 KQ、AJ、AK 压制（dominated），且全程没有位置。UTG 的 offsuit 开局下限大约在 AJo / KQo。
explanation.en: KJo looks decent, but five players remain behind UTG: it is frequently dominated by KQ, AJ and AK, and you play the hand out of position. The UTG offsuit floor sits around AJo / KQo.

raise.zh: 开太松：被 3-bet 时进退两难；被跟注后翻后常处于劣势踢脚，赢小输大。
raise.en: Too loose: you are squeezed when 3-bet, and when called you often have the worse kicker — winning small, losing big.

call.zh: limp 进多人底池，KJo 最容易做出"第二好的牌"而输大锅。
call.en: Limping into a multiway pot is how KJo makes the second-best hand and loses a big one.

objective.zh: 识别前位的 dominated offsuit 陷阱牌。
objective.en: Spot dominated offsuit traps in early position.

explanation.zh: BTN 的开局范围在 40% 以上，T8o 处在边缘但仍然有利可图：只剩两个盲注位防守，而且你翻后每条街都有位置。边缘牌正是靠位置赚钱的。
explanation.en: The button opens 40%+ of hands. T8o is near the edge but still profitable: only the blinds defend, and you act last on every street. Marginal hands are exactly where position pays.

fold.zh: 过紧：放弃了 BTN 的位置红利。在最好的位置弃掉可盈利的边缘牌，等于把钱留在桌上。
fold.en: Too tight: you are giving away the button's positional rent. Folding profitable edge hands in the best seat leaves money on the table.

call.zh: limp 不在本训练答案体系内：要么加注施压，要么放弃。
call.en: Open-limping is outside this trainer's answer set: raise to apply pressure, or let it go.

objective.zh: 体会位置如何拓宽开局范围。
objective.en: Feel how position widens the opening range.

explanation.zh: 72o 是最弱的起手牌之一：不同花、无连接、踢脚差。即使在 BTN，它也在任何合理开局范围之外——40% 多的范围仍然弃掉最差的那一半牌。
explanation.en: 72o is among the weakest starting hands: unsuited, disconnected, bad kicker. Even on the button it sits outside any sensible opening range — a 40%+ range still folds the worse half of hands.

raise.zh: "BTN 什么都能开"是误解：位置拓宽范围，但不会把垃圾牌变成盈利牌。
raise.en: "The button opens anything" is a myth: position widens the range, it does not turn trash into profit.

call.zh: limp 最弱牌只会在翻后持续烧钱。
call.en: Limping the weakest hands just burns money postflop.

objective.zh: 宽范围 ≠ 任意两张。
objective.en: A wide range is not any two cards.

explanation.zh: AQs 对 BTN 约 40%+ 的宽开局范围有明显价值优势：3-bet 既向更差的 Ax/Qx/宽范围取价值，又拿回主动权并部分抵消位置劣势。跟注也可接受，但会放掉大量翻前权益。
explanation.en: AQs holds a clear value edge over the button's 40%+ opening range: 3-betting extracts value from worse Ax/Qx and the wide field, regains initiative, and partly offsets being out of position. Calling is acceptable but leaves preflop equity behind.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 的宽开局弃掉 AQs 严重过紧——这手牌领先对手范围一大截。
fold.en: Folding AQs to a button open is far too tight — it is well ahead of the opening range.

objective.zh: 学会用强 suited broadway 3-bet 反击后位宽开。
objective.en: Use strong suited broadways to 3-bet wide late-position opens.

explanation.zh: JJ 面对 UTG 开局仍在范围前列：3-bet 取价值、把 AQo 一类牌打弃或孤立对手，并阻止盲注位便宜入池。跟注控池也可接受——代价是经常打多人底池、翻牌见高张。
explanation.en: JJ is still near the top versus a UTG open: 3-betting takes value, folds out or isolates hands like AQo, and stops the blinds from coming along cheaply. Flatting for pot control is acceptable — at the cost of more multiway pots and overcard flops.

fold.zh: JJ 远强于 UTG 开局范围的中位数，弃牌过紧。
fold.en: JJ is well above the median of a UTG opening range — folding is far too tight.

objective.zh: 面对前位开局用范围前列对子施压。
objective.en: Apply pressure with premium pairs even against early opens.

explanation.zh: 本训练基线从任何位置都开全部对子（22+）：小对子的盈利来自击中暗三条赢大锅（set mining），加注入池保持范围一致、避免 limp 泄露信息。
explanation.en: This baseline opens every pocket pair (22+) from any seat: small pairs profit by flopping sets and winning big pots, and raising keeps your range consistent instead of leaking information with a limp.

fold.zh: 过紧：55 在 22+ 的基线范围内。小对子弃掉的是整棵暗三条的盈利树。
fold.en: Too tight: 55 sits inside the 22+ baseline. Folding throws away the whole set-mining profit tree.

call.zh: limp 进多人底池后，没中暗三条的小对子几乎只能放弃——主动权一开始就丢了。
call.en: Limp into a multiway pot and an unimproved small pair can only give up — initiative was lost from the start.

objective.zh: 理解小对子的开局逻辑：set mining + 范围一致性。
objective.en: Understand small-pair opens: set mining plus range consistency.

explanation.zh: BTN 的 offsuit 下限延伸到 K9o / Q9o / J9o 一带：只剩两个盲注位防守，且你翻后每条街最后行动——这类牌的全部利润都来自位置。
explanation.en: The button's offsuit floor stretches down to K9o / Q9o / J9o: only the blinds defend, and you act last on every street — hands like this make all their profit from position.

fold.zh: 在 BTN 弃掉 K9o 过紧：它正好压在约 42% 基线的边界内侧。
fold.en: Folding K9o on the button is too tight: it sits just inside the ~42% baseline boundary.

call.zh: limp 放弃直接拿下盲注的机会，还把位置优势打了折。
call.en: Limping gives up the chance to take the blinds outright and discounts your positional edge.

objective.zh: 记住 BTN offsuit 边界牌的量级。
objective.en: Anchor the button's offsuit boundary hands.

explanation.zh: BTN 开所有同花 A（A2s+）：A 阻断对手的强牌、同花潜力提供兜底、轮子（A-5）顺子潜力额外加分——位置把这手边缘牌变成标准开局。
explanation.en: The button opens every suited ace (A2s+): the ace blocks strong hands, the flush potential provides a floor, and the wheel adds extra upside — position turns this edge hand into a standard open.

fold.zh: 同花小 A 在 BTN 是清晰的开局：弃牌放弃了阻断 + 同花 + 位置三重价值。
fold.en: Small suited aces are clear button opens: folding discards blocker, flush and position value all at once.

call.zh: limp 不在本训练答案体系内：要么加注施压，要么放弃。
call.en: Open-limping is outside this trainer's answer set: raise to pressure, or let it go.

objective.zh: 掌握同花 A 在后位的开局价值构成。
objective.en: Know what makes suited aces standard late-position opens.

explanation.zh: BB 已投入 1bb，面对 2.5bb 只需再补 1.5bb——约 23% 的盈亏平衡胜率让大盲的防守范围非常宽。95s 有同花与顺子潜力，对 BTN 的宽开局完全够格跟注防守。
explanation.en: The big blind has 1bb invested and only needs 1.5bb more — roughly 23% break-even equity makes the defend range very wide. With flush and straight potential, 95s comfortably defends against a wide button open.

fold.zh: 赔率算错的弃牌：你拿到的是全桌最便宜的入场价，95s 这种有潜力的同花牌正是该用折扣价防守的牌。
fold.en: A fold that miscounts the odds: you are getting the cheapest price at the table, and a playable suited hand like 95s is exactly what the discount is for.

3bet.zh: 无牌力、无阻断的 3-bet：被跟注后整手牌无位置打空气，被 4-bet 只能放弃。
3bet.en: A 3-bet with no strength and no blockers: called, you play air out of position; 4-bet, you simply surrender.

objective.zh: 用底池赔率理解 BB 的宽防守。
objective.en: Use pot odds to understand wide big-blind defense.

explanation.zh: 面对 CO 约 26% 的开局，KQs 处在范围前列：3-bet 向更差的 KQ/QJ/Kx 取价值、孤立对手、并阻止盲注便宜入池。有位置平跟控池也完全可行——但偏价值的 3-bet 是首选。
explanation.en: Against a ~26% cutoff open, KQs sits near the top: 3-betting charges worse KQ/QJ/Kx, isolates the opener, and shuts the blinds out. Flatting in position is fine too — but the value-leaning 3-bet is the first choice.

fold.zh: KQs 对 CO 范围领先一大截，弃牌严重过紧。
fold.en: KQs is well ahead of the cutoff's range — folding is far too tight.

objective.zh: 有位置时对后位开局用强 broadway 施压。
objective.en: Pressure late-position opens with strong broadways when in position.

explanation.zh: AJo 面对 UTG 紧范围是教科书级的被压制牌：对手的 AQ、AK、JJ+ 把它打成「中牌就输大锅」。不同花进一步压低可玩性。好看的牌 ≠ 能打的牌——对前位要给足尊重。
explanation.en: AJo against a tight UTG open is the textbook dominated hand: AQ, AK and JJ+ turn your good flops into big losses. Being offsuit lowers playability further. Pretty is not playable — respect early-position ranges.

call.zh: 跟注后翻牌中 A 中 J 都可能付大钱给更好的踢脚——这正是「赢小输大」的标准入口。
call.en: Call, and hitting your ace or jack often pays off a better kicker — the classic entrance to win-small-lose-big.

3bet.zh: 对 UTG 范围 3-bet AJo 两头落空：更差的牌不跟你，更好的牌不弃牌，被 4-bet 毫无退路。
3bet.en: 3-betting AJo into a UTG range fails both ways: worse hands fold, better hands continue, and a 4-bet leaves you nowhere to go.

objective.zh: 识别面对前位开局的被压制陷阱牌。
objective.en: Spot dominated traps against early-position opens.

explanation.zh: ATs 落在 UTG 约 14% 的开局范围之内：同花高张：命中顶对带好踢脚，还有坚果同花潜力。标准加注 2.5bb，让更差的牌付费进场。
explanation.en: ATs sits inside UTG's ~14% opening range: suited broadway: top pair comes with a good kicker plus nut-flush potential. Open the standard 2.5bb and make worse hands pay to play.

fold.zh: 按 UTG 约 14% 的范围口径，ATs 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。
fold.en: By UTG's ~14% range, ATs is a standard open — folding is too tight.

call.zh: 跛入是最贵的中庸：不抢位、不施压，还把盲注请进多人锅。
call.en: Limping is the priciest compromise: no position fight, no pressure, and the blinds get invited into a multiway pot.

objective.zh: 按位置范围执行标准开局。
objective.en: Execute the standard open by positional range.

explanation.zh: 99 落在 UTG 约 14% 的开局范围之内：中口袋对兼具摊牌价值与成套潜力。标准加注 2.5bb，让更差的牌付费进场。
explanation.en: 99 sits inside UTG's ~14% opening range: a middling pair with both showdown value and set potential. Open the standard 2.5bb and make worse hands pay to play.

fold.zh: 按 UTG 约 14% 的范围口径，99 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。
fold.en: By UTG's ~14% range, 99 is a standard open — folding is too tight.

call.zh: 跛入是最贵的中庸：不抢位、不施压，还把盲注请进多人锅。
call.en: Limping is the priciest compromise: no position fight, no pressure, and the blinds get invited into a multiway pot.

objective.zh: 按位置范围执行标准开局。
objective.en: Execute the standard open by positional range.

explanation.zh: 按表行事：UTG 的开局表收录了 KQo——两张高张好看，但反向支配风险高——命中顶对常被更大踢脚压住。开到 2.5bb 即可，不需要额外理由。
explanation.en: Play the chart: UTG's opening range includes KQo — two pretty high cards with heavy reverse-domination risk — top pair often loses to a bigger kicker. Raise to 2.5bb; no further justification required.

fold.zh: KQo 在 UTG 的开局表内，弃牌等于每圈白交盲注税。
fold.en: KQo is inside UTG's opening chart; folding it pays blind tax every orbit for nothing.

call.zh: 开局表里没有「跛入」这一栏——要么加注要么弃牌。
call.en: There is no limp column on an opening chart — raise or fold.

objective.zh: 按位置范围执行标准开局。
objective.en: Execute the standard open by positional range.

explanation.zh: A9s 紧贴 UTG 开局线的外侧：同样的结构放进更宽的范围就是标准开局，在这里仍是纪律弃牌——每一格收紧，都是位置在说话。
explanation.en: A9s hugs the outside of UTG's opening line: the same structure is a standard open in a wider range, here it stays a disciplined fold — every notch of tightening is position speaking.

raise.zh: 范围纪律的意义正在这种牌上：偶尔偷成一锅，长期漏率稳定为负。
raise.en: Range discipline exists for exactly this hand: it steals the odd pot and leaks steadily forever.

objective.zh: 体会范围随位置逐格收紧。
objective.en: Feel the range tighten seat by seat.

explanation.zh: QJs 进入 UTG 开局表靠的不是当下牌力而是结构：同花连张的全方位可玩性：同花、顺子、两对路线齐备。位置越靠后这类牌越值钱，照表加注 2.5bb。
explanation.en: QJs earns its slot in UTG's chart on structure, not raw strength: a suited connector with full playability — flush, straight and two-pair routes. Hands like this gain value with position — open 2.5bb per the chart.

fold.zh: 按 UTG 约 14% 的范围口径，QJs 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。
fold.en: By UTG's ~14% range, QJs is a standard open — folding is too tight.

objective.zh: 理解结构型牌的开局价值。
objective.en: Value structural hands in the opening range.

explanation.zh: 66 进入 UTG 开局表靠的不是当下牌力而是结构：小口袋对的核心资产是暗三条潜力。位置越靠后这类牌越值钱，照表加注 2.5bb。
explanation.en: 66 earns its slot in UTG's chart on structure, not raw strength: a small pair whose core asset is set potential. Hands like this gain value with position — open 2.5bb per the chart.

fold.zh: 按 UTG 约 14% 的范围口径，66 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。
fold.en: By UTG's ~14% range, 66 is a standard open — folding is too tight.

objective.zh: 理解结构型牌的开局价值。
objective.en: Value structural hands in the opening range.

explanation.zh: AJo 落在 HJ 约 20% 的开局范围之内：两张高张好看，但反向支配风险高——命中顶对常被更大踢脚压住。标准加注 2.5bb，让更差的牌付费进场。
explanation.en: AJo sits inside HJ's ~20% opening range: two pretty high cards with heavy reverse-domination risk — top pair often loses to a bigger kicker. Open the standard 2.5bb and make worse hands pay to play.

fold.zh: 按 HJ 约 20% 的范围口径，AJo 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。
fold.en: By HJ's ~20% range, AJo is a standard open — folding is too tight.

call.en: Limping is the priciest compromise: no position fight, no pressure, and the blinds get invited into a multiway pot.

objective.zh: 按位置范围执行标准开局。
objective.en: Execute the standard open by positional range.

objective.en: Execute the standard open by positional range.

objective.zh: 理解结构型牌的开局价值。
objective.en: Value structural hands in the opening range.

explanation.zh: HJ 约 20% 的范围宽到足以容纳 A9s：同花结构提供后门与可玩性，但当下牌力有限，偷盲收益与翻后可玩性双线进账。
explanation.en: HJ's ~20% range is wide enough for A9s: the suited structure offers backdoors and playability, though raw strength is modest, collecting on both blind pressure and postflop playability.

fold.zh: A9s 在 HJ 的开局表内，弃牌等于每圈白交盲注税。
fold.en: A9s is inside HJ's opening chart; folding it pays blind tax every orbit for nothing.

objective.zh: 理解结构型牌的开局价值。
objective.en: Value structural hands in the opening range.

explanation.zh: KTs 落在 HJ 约 20% 的开局范围之内：同花高张：命中顶对带好踢脚，还有坚果同花潜力。标准加注 2.5bb，让更差的牌付费进场。
explanation.en: KTs sits inside HJ's ~20% opening range: suited broadway: top pair comes with a good kicker plus nut-flush potential. Open the standard 2.5bb and make worse hands pay to play.

fold.zh: 按 HJ 约 20% 的范围口径，KTs 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。

objective.en: Value structural hands in the opening range.

explanation.zh: T9s 进入 HJ 开局表靠的不是当下牌力而是结构：同花连张的全方位可玩性：同花、顺子、两对路线齐备。位置越靠后这类牌越值钱，照表加注 2.5bb。
explanation.en: T9s earns its slot in HJ's chart on structure, not raw strength: a suited connector with full playability — flush, straight and two-pair routes. Hands like this gain value with position — open 2.5bb per the chart.

fold.zh: 按 HJ 约 20% 的范围口径，T9s 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。

explanation.zh: CO 约 26% 的范围宽到足以容纳 A5s：轮子 A 同花：阻断 AA/AK 关键组合，还带同花与顺子补牌，偷盲收益与翻后可玩性双线进账。

fold.zh: A5s 在 CO 的开局表内，弃牌等于每圈白交盲注税。
fold.en: A5s is inside CO's opening chart; folding it pays blind tax every orbit for nothing.

explanation.zh: KJo 落在 CO 约 26% 的开局范围之内：两张高张好看，但反向支配风险高——命中顶对常被更大踢脚压住。标准加注 2.5bb，让更差的牌付费进场。
explanation.en: KJo sits inside CO's ~26% opening range: two pretty high cards with heavy reverse-domination risk — top pair often loses to a bigger kicker. Open the standard 2.5bb and make worse hands pay to play.

fold.zh: 按 CO 约 26% 的范围口径，KJo 是标准开局——弃牌过紧。

call.zh: 跛入是最贵的中庸：不抢位、不施压，还把盲注请进多人锅。
call.en: Limping is the priciest compromise: no position fight, no pressure, and the blinds get invited into a multiway pot.

objective.zh: 按位置范围执行标准开局。

raise.en: Opening 96s from BTN hangs a 3-bet target for the seats behind — off-chart hands cannot take the counterpunch.

objective.zh: 理解结构型牌的开局价值。

explanation.zh: TT 对 BTN 的宽开局以价值 3-bet 为主线；平跟伪装同样收录在防守表里——两条路都在均衡内，但别把弃牌当选项。
explanation.en: TT 3-bets BTN's wide open for value as the main line; the disguised flat-call also lives in the defending chart — both roads are in equilibrium, but folding is not one of them.

fold.zh: 把范围里最能打的牌弃掉，等于自愿只剩中庸部分作战。
fold.en: Folding the most capable part of your range volunteers to fight with only the mediocre middle.

objective.zh: 掌握 3-bet 为主、平跟为辅的双线。
objective.en: Run the 3-bet-first, flat-second dual line.

explanation.zh: A5s 是 3-bet 表的诈唬翼：轮子 A 阻断对手 AA/AK 的关键组合，被跟注仍有同花顺子补牌，被 4-bet 时弃牌损失最小——教科书阻断牌诈唬。
explanation.en: A5s is the bluff wing of the 3-bet chart: the wheel ace blocks his key AA/AK combos, flush and straight backup survives a call, and folding to a 4-bet costs the minimum — textbook blocker bluff.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 的宽开局弃 A5s 严重过紧——这手牌压制其范围一大截。
fold.en: Folding A5s to BTN's wide open is far too tight — it dominates a large slice of that range.

objective.zh: 用阻断牌构建 3-bet 诈唬翼。
objective.en: Build the 3-bet bluff wing with blockers.

explanation.zh: JTs 对 BTN 约 41% 的开局范围领先或持平大半，平跟防守把对手的弱牌留在锅里继续犯错。
explanation.en: JTs runs ahead of or even with most of BTN's ~41% opening range; calling keeps his weaker hands in the pot to keep making mistakes.

fold.zh: 关锅只需再补 1.5bb，弃掉 JTs 是把价位白白退回去。
fold.en: Closing the action costs just 1.5bb more; folding JTs hands the price straight back.

objective.zh: 用领先范围的高张平跟防守。
objective.en: Defend by calling with range-beating broadways.

explanation.zh: KQo 对 BTN 约 41% 的开局范围领先或持平大半，平跟防守把对手的弱牌留在锅里继续犯错。
explanation.en: KQo runs ahead of or even with most of BTN's ~41% opening range; calling keeps his weaker hands in the pot to keep making mistakes.

fold.zh: 关锅只需再补 1.5bb，弃掉 KQo 是把价位白白退回去。
fold.en: Closing the action costs just 1.5bb more; folding KQo hands the price straight back.

objective.zh: 用领先范围的高张平跟防守。
objective.en: Defend by calling with range-beating broadways.

explanation.zh: 口袋 22 防守 BTN 开局的首选是平跟：关锅价合适、暗三条潜力完整；3-bet 反而赶走愿意付钱的部分。
explanation.en: Pocket 22 defends the BTN open by calling: the closing price is right and set potential stays intact; 3-betting only chases away the hands that pay.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 这么宽的开局弃 22，等于宣布大盲不设防。
fold.en: Folding 22 to an open this wide announces an undefended big blind.

3bet.zh: 用 22 升级底池两头不讨好：更好的牌不走、更差的牌不跟——潜力牌要的是便宜看翻牌。
3bet.en: Escalating with 22 pleases nobody: better hands stay, worse hands leave — potential hands want a cheap flop.

objective.zh: 用关锅价为小对买成套彩票。
objective.en: Buy set lottery tickets at the closing price.

explanation.zh: 76s 进入大盲防守表：同花连张的全方位可玩性：同花、顺子、两对路线齐备。作为关锅方只需再补 1.5bb，这类牌的隐含赔率因此成立。
explanation.en: 76s makes the big-blind defending chart: a suited connector with full playability — flush, straight and two-pair routes. Closing the action for just 1.5bb more is what makes its implied odds work.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 这么宽的开局弃 76s，等于宣布大盲不设防。
fold.en: Folding 76s to an open this wide announces an undefended big blind.

3bet.zh: 用 76s 升级底池两头不讨好：更好的牌不走、更差的牌不跟——潜力牌要的是便宜看翻牌。
3bet.en: Escalating with 76s pleases nobody: better hands stay, worse hands leave — potential hands want a cheap flop.

objective.zh: 用价格 + 结构防守大盲。
objective.en: Defend the big blind on price plus structure.

explanation.zh: K9s 站在 3-bet 表的进攻翼：同花结构带补牌、对 BTN 约 41% 的宽开局有充足弃牌权益，被跟注也不至于裸奔——价值与诈唬之间的弹性件，平跟同样收录在防守表里。
explanation.en: K9s mans the attacking wing of the 3-bet chart: suited backup, ample fold equity against BTN's ~41% open, and never naked when called — the flex piece between value and bluff, with the flat-call also living in the defending chart.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 的宽开局弃 K9s 严重过紧——这手牌压制其范围一大截。
fold.en: Folding K9s to BTN's wide open is far too tight — it dominates a large slice of that range.

objective.zh: 用同花弹性件扩充 3-bet 进攻翼。
objective.en: Stretch the 3-bet attack with suited flex hands.

explanation.zh: QTo 对 BTN 约 41% 的开局范围领先或持平大半，平跟防守把对手的弱牌留在锅里继续犯错。
explanation.en: QTo runs ahead of or even with most of BTN's ~41% opening range; calling keeps his weaker hands in the pot to keep making mistakes.

fold.zh: 面对 BTN 这么宽的开局弃 QTo，等于宣布大盲不设防。
fold.en: Folding QTo to an open this wide announces an undefended big blind.

objective.zh: 用领先范围的高张平跟防守。
objective.en: Defend by calling with range-beating broadways.

explanation.zh: 面对 BTN 约 41% 的开局，J8s 的防守逻辑是价格 + 结构：同花结构提供后门与可玩性，但当下牌力有限。
explanation.en: Against BTN's ~41% open, J8s defends on price plus structure: the suited structure offers backdoors and playability, though raw strength is modest.

fold.zh: 关锅只需再补 1.5bb，弃掉 J8s 是把价位白白退回去。
fold.en: Closing the action costs just 1.5bb more; folding J8s hands the price straight back.

3bet.zh: 3-bet 把这手牌的伪装全部撕掉，还把可玩性押在翻前。
3bet.en: A 3-bet strips the hand's disguise and stakes its playability on preflop.

objective.zh: 用价格 + 结构防守大盲。
objective.en: Defend the big blind on price plus structure.

explanation.zh: 面对 BTN 约 41% 的开局，A9o 的防守逻辑是价格 + 结构：既缺连接又缺同花，几乎没有翻后剧本。
explanation.en: Against BTN's ~41% open, A9o defends on price plus structure: no connectivity, no suit — almost no postflop script.

3bet.zh: 诈唬也讲组合学：J7o 既无阻断也无补牌，被跟注后只剩祈祷。
3bet.en: Bluffs obey combinatorics too: J7o holds no blockers and no backup — once called, only prayer remains.

call.zh: 跛入救不了范围外的牌——问题在牌本身，不在进场方式。
call.en: Limping cannot rescue an off-chart hand — the problem is the cards, not the entry method.

objective.zh: 诈唬资格也要按组合学排队。
objective.en: Even bluffs queue by combinatorics.

explanation.zh: Q6o 离 SB 的 3-bet 表（约 10% ）很远：没有价值、没有阻断、没有补牌结构——连诈唬的资格都排不上。
explanation.en: Q6o sits far from SB's ~10% 3-bet chart: no value, no blockers, no backup structure — it does not even qualify as a bluff.

3bet.zh: 诈唬也讲组合学：Q6o 既无阻断也无补牌，被跟注后只剩祈祷。
3bet.en: Bluffs obey combinatorics too: Q6o holds no blockers and no backup — once called, only prayer remains.

call.zh: 跛入救不了范围外的牌——问题在牌本身，不在进场方式。
call.en: Limping cannot rescue an off-chart hand — the problem is the cards, not the entry method.

objective.zh: 诈唬资格也要按组合学排队。
objective.en: Even bluffs queue by combinatorics.

explanation.zh: QQ 对 CO 约 26% 的开局是清晰的价值 3-bet：把死钱与更差牌的跟注一起收进来，同时夺回主动权。
explanation.en: QQ is a clean value 3-bet against CO's ~26% open: collect the dead money and worse hands' calls while taking back the initiative.

fold.zh: 把范围里最能打的牌弃掉，等于自愿只剩中庸部分作战。
fold.en: Folding the most capable part of your range volunteers to fight with only the mediocre middle.

call.zh: BTN 没有舒适的平跟剧本：位置吃亏、还邀请后手挤压——价值牌直接 3-bet。
call.en: BTN owns no comfortable flatting script: bad position and an open invitation to squeezes — value hands 3-bet outright.

objective.zh: 对宽开局执行价值 3-bet。
objective.en: Value 3-bet the wide open.

explanation.zh: 面对这么宽的开局范围，AKo 的压制力必须立刻变现——3-bet 为价值建锅，也让对手的中等牌当场两难。
explanation.en: Against an open this wide, AKo's dominance must cash in now — 3-bet to build for value and put his medium hands in an instant bind.

fold.zh: 面对 CO 的宽开局弃 AKo 严重过紧——这手牌压制其范围一大截。
fold.en: Folding AKo to CO's wide open is far too tight — it dominates a large slice of that range.

call.zh: BTN 没有舒适的平跟剧本：位置吃亏、还邀请后手挤压——价值牌直接 3-bet。
call.en: BTN owns no comfortable flatting script: bad position and an open invitation to squeezes — value hands 3-bet outright.

objective.zh: 对宽开局执行价值 3-bet。
objective.en: Value 3-bet the wide open.

explanation.zh: A5s 是 3-bet 表的诈唬翼：轮子 A 阻断对手 AA/AK 的关键组合，被跟注仍有同花顺子补牌，被 4-bet 时弃牌损失最小——教科书阻断牌诈唬。
explanation.en: A5s is the bluff wing of the 3-bet chart: the wheel ace blocks his key AA/AK combos, flush and straight backup survives a call, and folding to a 4-bet costs the minimum — textbook blocker bluff.

fold.zh: 面对 CO 的宽开局弃 A5s 严重过紧——这手牌压制其范围一大截。
fold.en: Folding A5s to CO's wide open is far too tight — it dominates a large slice of that range.

objective.zh: 用阻断牌构建 3-bet 诈唬翼。
objective.en: Build the 3-bet bluff wing with blockers.

explanation.zh: Q8o 离 BTN 的 3-bet 表（约 6% ）很远：没有价值、没有阻断、没有补牌结构——连诈唬的资格都排不上。
explanation.en: Q8o sits far from BTN's ~6% 3-bet chart: no value, no blockers, no backup structure — it does not even qualify as a bluff.

3bet.zh: 诈唬也讲组合学：Q8o 既无阻断也无补牌，被跟注后只剩祈祷。
3bet.en: Bluffs obey combinatorics too: Q8o holds no blockers and no backup — once called, only prayer remains.

call.zh: 价位诱人不等于价值存在：Q8o 的翻后剧本几乎全是「赢小输大」。
call.en: A tempting price is not value: Q8o's postflop scripts are almost all win-small-lose-big.

objective.zh: 诈唬资格也要按组合学排队。
objective.en: Even bluffs queue by combinatorics.
